creator: webmaster@kibab.com
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I'm not sure if it makes any sense to update this library without
updating the rest of the SynCE suite.
And that is impossible without adapting SynCE to use our devd.

Please see the full discussion regarding new SynCE release on FreeBSD here:
http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/forum.php?thread_name=1326621248.4299.2.camel%40mark07&forum_name=synce-devel

So -- discarding patch now.

On 28.04.12 13:20, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of palm/synce-libsynce,
>
> Please note that PR ports/167387 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/167387
>

- -- 
Regards,
Ilya Bakulin
http://kibab.com
xmpp://kibab612@jabber.ru
